name: New York Community Bancorp Inc. New York Community Capital Tr V (BONUSES)
summary: New York Community Bancorp, Inc. is a bank holding company based in Hicksville, New York. It operates through its bank subsidiary, Flagstar Bank, N.A., providing traditional banking services, including multi-family lending, commercial real estate lending, and retail banking. They also offer various financial products and services to individuals, families, and businesses.
